channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Auto Walk Extended
item.description: Toggle automatic walking, sprinting and sneaking. Supports also automatic climbing.

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: fish(wastaken) Classes Patch
item.description: small personal patch for GlooMeClasses.

item.title: Temporal Relics
item.description: Adds randomized affixes to found equipment, introducing mundane, corrupted, and temporally enhanced

item.title: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack
item.description: Vintage Story Chinese Language Pack（复古物语模组汉化包）

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Resonator Overhaul
item.description: Per-resonator volume, falloff and looping — saved to the world and audible with Music off.

item.title: Tuning Cylinder Color Top & Bottom
item.description: Makes tuning cyliders show their color on the bottom as well as the top.

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: To Rule Them All: Dale and Dorwinion
item.description: Defend the vast trade networks of the North

item.title: To Rule Them All: Middle-Earth Characters
item.description: Don armor by the warriors, kings, and dark lords whose deeds shaped the fate of Middle-earth.

item.title: To Rule Them All: Dwarves
item.description: By hammer and anvil, we shape the world.

item.title: To Rule Them All: Woodland Realm
item.description: Hidden in the Greenwood of Old, a kingdom still thrives.

item.title: To Rule Them All: Rohan
item.description: Ride for wrath! Ride for ruin!

item.title: To Rule Them All: Misty Mountain Orcs
item.description: In the deep caves of the Misty Mountains, cruelty is law.

item.title: To Rule Them All: Mordor
item.description: The legions of the Black Land are marching out once more.

item.title: To Rule Them All: Isengard
item.description: The old world will burn in the fires of industry. The forests will fall. A new order will rise.

item.title: To Rule Them All: Gondor
item.description: Heirs of Númenor, wardens of the West.

item.title: More Beams
item.description: Create beams of various sizes and decorations.

item.title: Prospector's Instinct
item.description: Subtle particle guidance that helps locate nearby ore while preserving the spirit of prospecting.

item.title: Force Character Class Change
item.description: Forces all players to reselect their class.

item.title: Bayou Basics Roleplay
item.description: Fork of "The Basics" with SS14 inspired RP changes

item.title: Seraph Girls
item.description: Look cute while you do pottery, starve, and get hunted by horrors beyond comprehension!

item.title: lhgui
item.description: GUI mod for lasthearth server

item.title: More Creative Block Colors
item.description: Adds more creative block colors

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.

item.title: Dense Ground Storage
item.description: Place down more items per block and on chiseled blocks
